message:
feat(fcp-e2e): add --request-file support and extend log redaction

Adds --request-file flag for loading JSON-RPC requests from files
(supporting both single objects and arrays), keeping secrets out of
command-line arguments and shell history. Extends log redaction to
cover "credential" and "authorization" keys. Includes 4 unit tests
for payload parsing and file-based array loading.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
